name: Cindy
description: A 20-minute AMRAP of the classic pull-up, push-up, and air-squat triplet at 5-10-15 reps per round — one of the most commonly used benchmarks for tracking bodyweight conditioning over time.
source_notes: crossfit.com/faq/wod (official CrossFit FAQ, 'Explain The Workouts with Names (the Girls)?'), retrieved 2026-07-08
